name: Xenociders
short_description: Hide, hunt and be hunted. Xenociders is a tense stealth VR shooter set on a lush planet ruled by ferocious alien dinosaurs.
detailed_description:
Xenociders is a stealth action VR shooter set on a lush planet ruled by ferocious alien dinosaur predators.

Hide. Hunt. Be hunted.


You’re the sole survivor of a shuttle crash on a deadly alien world.
Explore a series of wide regions and find a way to go back to orbit, to safety.

Observe your surroundings.
Stay low.
Sneak your way through the vegetation and avoid engaging the dinosaur-like predators.
And if it comes to you or them, your weapons pack a serious punch so fight it out till the end!

Key Features


A vast alien jungle ruled by dinosaur-like deadly, vicious predators.

  • Explore the lushest jungle ever seen in VR.
  • Stay hidden! Stealth is key to survival. Know your surroundings, recon the area and plot a course that will keep you out of harm’s way.
  • Not a wave shooter! Predators will employ challenging strategies to wear your group down.
  • Explore a beautiful, lush world in VR.
  • Weapons that pack a punch! From assault rifles to energy bows, weapons are deadly, precise and satisfying.
